description: Feature ID: rMDb07-o Update the settings editor to add Ctrl+S as the hot key for Save and remove the icon on the save button. Remove the page right margin line on the ace editor used in the settings.
planPoints: 1. Add Ctrl+S keyboard shortcut to save the settings file in client.js — added document-level Ctrl+S/Cmd+S handler for settings view + Ace editor command binding
2. Remove the floppy disk icon from the save button in templates.ts — removed 💾 emoji from button text
3. Hide the print margin line in the Ace editor settings in client.js — added showPrintMargin: false to editor options
title: Add Ctrl+S save shortcut and clean settings editor UI
summary: Added Ctrl+S (Cmd+S on Mac) keyboard shortcut to save the current file in the settings editor, implemented at both the document level and as an Ace editor command. Removed the floppy disk icon from the Save button in the toolbar and disabled the print margin line display in the Ace editor.

conversationHistory.content: I'll start by reading the feature file and exploring the project structure.Now let me find the settings editor UI components:

Find all files related to the "settings editor" in this codebase. Look for:
1. Any settings editor component (React, Ink, or web UI)
2. Files that use Ace editor or any code editor
3. Save button components
4. Keyboard shortcut / hotkey handling (Ctrl+S)

Search thoroughly in src/ and any UI directories. Return the file paths and a brief description of what each contains relevant to the settings editor.
find /Users/brian/Projects/KaiBot/web -type f -name "*.js" | head -20

Grep: {"pattern":"Ctrl\\+S|ctrl.*s|save.*button|saveSettingsFile","path":"/Users/brian/Projects/KaiBot/web/static/html/client.js","output_mode":"count"}
grep -n "Ctrl\|ctrlKey\|keydown" /Users/brian/Projects/KaiBot/web/static/html/client.js | head -30
find /Users/brian/Projects/KaiBot/web -name "*.css" | head -10
grep -n "settings" /Users/brian/Projects/KaiBot/web/static/css/main.css | head -30
grep -r "saveSettings\|settingsAceEditor\|settings-save-btn\|Ctrl.*S" /Users/brian/Projects/KaiBot/src --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" 2>/dev/null | head -20
Let me read the specific files I need to modify:Now I have a clear picture. Let me also check for any existing keyboard event handler:
Grep: {"pattern":"keydown|hotkey|keyboard|Ctrl","path":"/Users/brian/Projects/KaiBot/web/static/html/client.js","output_mode":"content","-C":3}
Now I have everything I need. Let me append the plan and then implement the changes.Now let me implement all three changes:

{"tool":"Edit","path":"/Users/brian/Projects/KaiBot/src/web/templates.ts","old":"<button id=\"settings-save-btn\" class=\"settings-save-btn\">💾 Save</button>","new":"<button id=\"settings-save-btn\" class=\"settings-save-btn\">Save</button>"}

Now I also need to make sure the Ace editor's default Ctrl+S binding doesn't conflict. Let me also add a command binding to the Ace editor itself to prevent it from handling Ctrl+S on its own (Ace has a default binding that could interfere). Actually, looking at the keydown handler, it's at the document level and fires before Ace's internal handling, and `e.preventDefault()` should stop propagation. But to be safe, let me also add an Ace command:
Now let me update the feature file to mark all steps as done and add the summary:Let me verify the changes look correct:
npm run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5
Typecheck passes. Let me also quickly verify the final state of the changed files:
git diff --stat

All three changes are implemented:

1. **Ctrl+S hotkey** — Added both a document-level `keydown` handler (fires when `currentView === "settings"` and Ctrl+S/Cmd+S is pressed) and an Ace editor command binding (`saveSettings`) so the shortcut works whether focus is in the editor or elsewhere in the settings view.

2. **Removed save button icon** — Removed the `💾` (💾) floppy disk emoji from the save button in `templates.ts`, leaving just the "Save" text.

3. **Hidden print margin line** — Added `showPrintMargin: false` to the Ace editor options in `initSettingsEditor()`, removing the vertical page margin line.
✅ Feature complete — Cost: $0.6975  Turns: 19  Time: 136.6s
